nasb.text: But he became angry and was not willing to go in; and his father came out and began pleading with him.

esv.text: But he was angry and refused to go in. His father came out and entreated him,

cnv.text: 大兒子就生氣，不肯進去；父親出來勸他。

ccb.text: 大儿子很生气，不肯进去。父亲就出来劝他。

csbs.text: “大儿子发怒，不肯进去，他父亲就出来劝    他。
